description.value: Aura moderate enchantment; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 20,800 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This sturdy-looking hickory staff is capped with a figurine of an angelor other benevolent spirit, wings and arms outstretched as if in welcome. This staff allows use of the following spells: Bless (1 charge) Remove fear (1 charge) Prayer (2 charges) Remove paralysis (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells bless, prayer, remove fear, remove paralysis; Cost 10,400 gp.
